newsArray.title: ICC T20 World Cup glory & love stories: Hardik Pandya’s kiss with Mahieka Sharma, Ishan Kishan’s celebration with Aditi Hundia go viral
newsArray.description: India’s historic ICC T20 World Cup triumph was a night of roaring cheers, fireworks and unforgettable celebrations. But beyond the cricketing glory, two romantic moments involving Hardik Pandya and Ishan Kishan quietly stole the spotlight.As Team India lifted the trophy at the Narendra Modi Stadium in Ahmedabad, love and celebration blended seamlessly on the field and in the stands, adding an emotional layer to India’s memorable victory.Related Story: T20 World Cup 2026: Men in Blue maul Kiwis to retain titleIndia Creates History in T20 World Cup Final India scripted history by becoming the first team to successfully defend the ICC T20 World Cup title. Led by Suryakumar Yadav, the Men in Blue defeated New Zealand by a massive 96 runs in the final to claim their third T20 World Cup crown. Several players delivered standout performances during the high-stakes clash.Jasprit Bumrah was adjudged Player of the Match, while Sanju Samson top-scored to anchor India’s innings. Wicketkeeper-batter Ishan Kishan also played a key role, smashing a quickfire 50 that helped India post a mammoth total. While the on-field brilliance thrilled fans, the celebrations that followed soon captured the internet’s attention.Hardik Pandya’s Viral Celebration with Mahieka Sharma Among the most talked-about moments of the night was Hardik Pandya’s celebration with girlfriend Mahieka Sharma. Moments after the victory, Mahieka rushed onto the field and wrapped Hardik in a warm hug before planting a peck on his cheek. Photos and videos of the moment quickly went viral as the couple celebrated the historic win together.A sweet moment after the win ❤️🏏Hardik Pandya was seen holding his girlfriend Mahieka Sharma’s hand after the match, showing love and respect. 🥹Fans are loving this wholesome moment!🔗Follow https://t.co/0L4vAVgo2H#HardikPandya #Cricket #TeamIndia #ViralMoment pic.twitter.com/vDgeblSJB0— Jeetwin Sports (@Jeetwin_Sports) March 9, 2026Speaking to the host broadcaster after the triumph, Hardik reflected on the emotional significance of the victory.“This is the victory I have always lived for. This is why I have played cricket. I want to win trophies. I want to win as many trophies as I can. In 2024, I had said that whatever trophies I play for, I will win. And I believe that. This trophy is a validation of that,” said Hardik.He also spoke about the positive influence Mahieka has had on his life.“There is a lot of hard work. There is not only talk, but there is a lot of hard work. Work hard, stay silent, be a good person. Since Maheika has come into my life, I have only been winning,” he added.Mahieka later shared a proud tribute on Instagram Stories, posting Hardik’s photo with the caption, “the man, the myth, the legend”.The couple reportedly began dating in 2025, and Mahieka, a 25-year-old model and actor, has frequently been seen supporting Hardik during matches.Ishan Kishan Celebrates with Aditi Hundia While Hardik celebrated on the field, another moment of joy unfolded in the stands. Jaipur-based model and former beauty queen Aditi Hundia was present at the Narendra Modi Stadium during the final, cheering enthusiastically for Team India. Wearing a red top, she was spotted on the live broadcast alongside the friends and families of Indian players.After the match ended in India’s historic win, Aditi joined other WAGs on the field to celebrate with the team. Cameras captured her hugging Ishan Kishan as he wrapped himself in the Indian flag following his crucial knock.Ishan Kishan was seen dancing and sharing a kiss with his girlfriend, Aditi Hundia. 💃❤️pic.twitter.com/Bbw0QyQlpf— Magadh Updates (@magadh_updates) March 9, 2026Aditi Hundia rose to fame after becoming a finalist in the 2017 Miss India pageant and later winning the Miss Diva Supranational title. She represented India at Miss Supranational 2019 and later transitioned into fashion modelling and entrepreneurship, launching her own fashion and makeup label.Must Check: Babar Azam and Mohammad Rizwan’s funny warm-up routine sparks global meme frenzy, watch viral clipsAlthough neither Aditi nor Ishan has publicly confirmed their relationship, they have been spotted together several times over the years, keeping fans curious.
creator: nitesh kumar sahoo

newsArray.title: Power Of The Collective: It Was The Whole Team That Made The World Cup Possible
newsArray.description: An opinion column credits coach Gautam Gambhir and captain Suryakumar Yadav for guiding the India national cricket team to a T20 World Cup triumph built on teamwork rather than superstars. The piece argues that belief in lesser-known players and collective resilience helped India win despite pressure and the absence of senior icons.
creator: ashutosh

newsArray.title: After T20 Triumph, India Targets Historic ‘White-Ball Treble’ with 2027 ODI World Cup
newsArray.description: After winning the T20 World Cup 2026 under Suryakumar Yadav, Team India has now won four titles in two years. Following this and their 2025 Champions Trophy triumph, the team, guided by coach Gautam Gambhir, is now aiming for a historic white-ball treble by targeting the 2027 ODI World Cup.
creator: hrishikesh damodar

newsArray.title: T20 World Cup: Sahibzada Farhan makes it to ICC’s Team of the Tournament
newsArray.description: The International Cricket Council (ICC) on Monday announced the Team of the Tournament for this year’s T20 World Cup, with Pakistani opener Sahibzada Farhaan making the list despite the Green Shirts’ dismal campaign.Farhan became the only Pakistani player to be named in the 12-member team for his excellent performance during the tournament, sealing 383 runs – the highest a batter has scored in a single edition of the T20 World Cup.“Though Pakistan were patchy in the tournament, Sahibzada Farhan was consistently brilliant,” the ICC said.“The 29-year-old opener also became the first batter to score two hundreds in a single edition of a T20 World Cup. The highlight was a century he scored against Sri Lanka in the final Super Eight clash, setting up a five-run win,” it added.The right-handed Pakistani batter scored tons in the matches against Namibia and Sri Lanka. He had also scored two half-centuries against the USA and England.Meanwhile, his 176-run partnership with Fakhar Zaman against Sri Lanka was the record highest for any wicket in the history of the T20 World Cup. The ICC’s Team of the Tournament also included four players from team India, this year’s champions. These included Sanju Samson, Ishan Kishan, Hardik Pandya and Jasprit Bumrah.England’s Will Jacks and Adil Rashid, West Indies’ Jason Holder, Zimbabwe’s Blessing Muzarabani, and South Africa’s Aidan Markram and Lungi Ngidi were also included. Markram was also named the captain.Moreover, the USA’s Shadley Van Schalkwyk was named the 12th player.
creator: none@none.com (news desk)

newsArray.title: 'Not about spin matchups': Gautam Gambhir reveals real reason behind Sanju Samson’s recall - Watch
newsArray.description: India's head coach Gautam Gambhir revealed Sanju Samson's return aimed to inject more attacking firepower into the top order, not to counter specific bowlers. The management prioritizes aggressive intent and explosive batting in the powerplay, believing Samson significantly enhances this strategy. Gambhir emphasized skill over theoretical matchups, fostering a relaxed team environment.
creator: toi sports desk

newsArray.title: T20 World Cup: Sahibzada Farhan makes it to ICC’s Team of the Tournament
newsArray.description: The International Cricket Council (ICC) on Monday announced the Team of the Tournament for this year’s T20 World Cup, with Pakistani opener Sahibzada Farhaan making the list despite the Green Shirts’ dismal campaign.Farhan became the only Pakistani player to be named in the 12-member team for his excellent performance during the tournament, sealing 383 runs – the highest a batter has scored in a single edition of the T20 World Cup.“Though Pakistan were patchy in the tournament, Sahibzada Farhan was consistently brilliant,” the ICC said.“The 29-year-old opener also became the first batter to score two hundreds in a single edition of a T20 World Cup. The highlight was a century he scored against Sri Lanka in the final Super Eight clash, setting up a five-run win,” it added.The right-handed Pakistani batter scored tons in the matches against Namibia and Sri Lanka. He had also scored two half-centuries against the USA and England.Meanwhile, his 176-run partnership with Fakhar Zaman against Sri Lanka was the record highest for any wicket in the history of the T20 World Cup. The ICC’s Team of the Tournament also included four players from team India, this year’s champions. These included Sanju Samson, Ishan Kishan, Hardik Pandya and Jasprit Bumrah.England’s Will Jacks and Adil Rashid, West Indies’ Jason Holder, Zimbabwe’s Blessing Muzarabani, and South Africa’s Aidan Markram and Lungi Ngidi were also included. Markram was also named the captain.Moreover, the USA’s Shadley Van Schalkwyk was named the 12th player.
creator: none@none.com (news desk)

newsArray.title: 'Not about spin matchups': Gautam Gambhir reveals real reason behind Sanju Samson’s recall - Watch
newsArray.description: India's head coach Gautam Gambhir revealed Sanju Samson's return aimed to inject more attacking firepower into the top order, not to counter specific bowlers. The management prioritizes aggressive intent and explosive batting in the powerplay, believing Samson significantly enhances this strategy. Gambhir emphasized skill over theoretical matchups, fostering a relaxed team environment.
creator: toi sports desk

newsArray.description: The upcoming white-ball series between Afghanistan and Sri Lanka, originally scheduled to be held in the UAE from March 13, is likely to be postponed indefinitely.
